title: Hospital Achieves Outstanding CQC Rating
excerpt: The hospital has been rated Outstanding by the Care Quality Commission in its latest inspection.
content: The Care Quality Commission has awarded the hospital an Outstanding rating - the highest possible - following an inspection in February 2024. Inspectors highlighted patient safety

title: New Day Surgery Unit Now Open
excerpt: Our brand new state-of-the-art day surgery unit has opened its doors to patients.
content: The new 12-theatre day surgery unit is now accepting patients. The unit features the latest minimally invasive surgical technology, dedicated recovery suites, and is designed to significantly reduce waiting times.

title: Cardiology Department Introduces New Heart Procedure
excerpt: The cardiology team has introduced a new minimally invasive procedure to treat atrial fibrillation.
content: The cardiac electrophysiology team has performed its first pulsed field ablation procedures for atrial fibrillation. The new technique is faster than traditional methods and associated with fewer complications.

title: Hospital Food Transformed in New Initiative
excerpt: Patient satisfaction with hospital food has risen to 94% following a major transformation of catering services.
content: Following a complete review of its catering services, patient satisfaction scores for hospital food have risen from 61% to 94%. A new seasonal menu developed with a Michelin-trained chef has been introduced across all wards.

title: Orthopaedic Team Reduces Hip Replacement Waiting Times
excerpt: Average waiting times for hip replacement have been cut from 18 months to 6 months.
content: A dedicated orthopaedic waiting list initiative has dramatically reduced the time patients wait for hip and knee replacement surgery. Weekend operating lists and two additional consultant appointments have been key factors.

title: New Maternity Unit Wins Design Award
excerpt: The hospital's new maternity unit has won a national design award for patient-centred care environment.
content: The new maternity unit, which opened in January 2024, has been awarded the NHS Estates and Facilities Design Award. The unit features 12 single-occupancy rooms, a birthing pool suite and dedicated bereavement suite.

title: Outpatient App Helps 50000 Patients Manage Appointments
content: 000 patients are now using the hospital's patient app to manage appointments and receive test results.
status: The hospital's dedicated patient app, launched 18 months ago, has now reached 50,000 active users. Features include appointment management, test result notifications and direct messaging with clinical teams.

title: Hospital Research Team Wins Major Grant
excerpt: The hospital's research team has been awarded a £2.5 million grant to study post-surgical recovery pathways.
content: A multidisciplinary research team has been awarded a major NIHR grant to investigate factors that affect recovery following major surgery. The four-year study will recruit 2

title: Volunteer Programme Reaches 500 Members
excerpt: The hospital's volunteer programme has grown to 500 active volunteers supporting patients and staff.
content: The hospital's volunteer programme has welcomed its 500th volunteer. Volunteers support patients across inpatient wards, outpatient departments and the hospital's veterans programme.

title: Hospital Staff Satisfaction at Record High
excerpt: The latest NHS Staff Survey results show staff satisfaction at the hospital has reached a record high of 78%.
content: Results from the 2023 NHS Staff Survey place the hospital in the top 10% of NHS Trusts for overall staff engagement and satisfaction. The score of 7.8 out of 10 is the highest the hospital has ever achieved.
